prompt: Tap left hole card to keep your read and action aligned.
why_v1: Card anchors keep your decision process consistent.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Qh is the anchor card, so the read stays tied to the exact hole-card cue this line is built on.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The queen of hearts matters because that card changes blocker strength and shows whether the tournament-pressure line has real equity behind it.
